scripts.sync: npm run build:mobile -w @event/web && npx cap sync android
scripts.apk:debug: npm run sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home} ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.apk:release: npm run sync && cd android && JAVA_HOME=${JAVA_HOME:-/opt/homebrew/opt/openjdk@21/libexec/openjdk.jdk/Contents/Home} ./gradlew assembleRelease
